prompt: An editorial illustration poster in a bold Swiss Punk and Neo-Dadaist style. The composition features uploaded person photo to become an abstract side human profile overlaid with geometric shapes. The artwork uses a striking mix of structured graphic design and gritty street art, including raw black ink splatters, halftone dot textures, and layered stencil graffiti in the background. The design is dominated by heavy, oversized typography with mismatched distressed sans-serif fonts and abstract symbols arranged in a dynamic editorial layout. High-contrast color palette of deep black, raw off-white paper texture, and a vivid accent of electric purple. Grungy, textured, and contemporary aesthetic.
